positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic howling wolf and a leaping full moon, rendered in a high-contrast linework style reminiscent of vintage occult engravings and modern minimalist tattoo art. The wolf's silhouette is sharp and dynamic, composed of fine, intricate geometric patterns and flowing abstract linework. The full moon is depicted with celestial cosmic dust streaks and subtle glowing elements. The composition is perfectly centered, framed by stylized celestial foliage and geometric mandalas. Palette: Limited monochrome with hints of deep indigo and silver metallic accents. Style: Intricate line art, engraving, symmetry, occult, tattoo design, suitable for apparel repeat pattern, perfect print resolution, high detail.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, low detail, amateur, watermark, text, logo, writing, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, dirty, messy, grayscale only
